allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=MeoMeo123 psql -h node-1.whitecat.cloud -p 20100 -U whitecat -d whitecat_store -f src/database/seed-products.sql)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=MeoMeo123 psql -h node-1.whitecat.cloud -p 20100 -U whitecat -d whitecat_store -c "SELECT c.name as category, COUNT\(*\) as products FROM products p JOIN product_categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.product_status = 'active' GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY products DESC;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=MeoMeo123 psql -h node-1.whitecat.cloud -p 20100 -U whitecat -d whitecat_store -c "SELECT name, cover_image_url FROM products WHERE cover_image_url IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=MeoMeo123 psql -h node-1.whitecat.cloud -p 20100 -U whitecat -d whitecat_store -t -A -c "SELECT slug FROM products WHERE cover_image_url IS NULL AND product_status='active' ORDER BY name;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=MeoMeo123 psql -h node-1.whitecat.cloud -p 20100 -U whitecat -d whitecat_store -t -A -c "SELECT cover_image_url FROM products WHERE slug LIKE 'ban-phim-%' OR slug LIKE 'dareu-%' OR slug LIKE 'darmoshark-%' OR slug LIKE 'machenike-%' OR slug LIKE 'motospeed-%' OR slug LIKE 'fuhlen-%' OR slug = 'asus-tuf-gaming-k3-gen2';")

Bash(psql "postgresql://whitecat:MeoMeo123@node-1.whitecat.cloud:20100/whitecat_store" -c "SELECT slug FROM products WHERE slug LIKE 'intel-core%' OR slug LIKE 'amd-ryzen%' OR slug LIKE '%rtx%' OR slug LIKE '%rx-%' ORDER BY slug;")
